zh.lifeSummary: 當Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha於1145年出生在葡萄牙布拉加時，他的父親Fernão Paes da Cunha42歲，母親D. Mayor Rendufe35歲。他於1198年10月24日與Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1225年之後在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加庫尼亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha于1145年出生在葡萄牙布拉加时，他的父亲Fernão Paes da Cunha42岁，母亲D. Mayor Rendufe35岁。他于1198年10月24日与Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1225年之后在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加庫尼亞。

nameMeanings.name: Fernandes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Mario, Francisco, Orlando, Ana, Abilio, Americo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Henrique, Ilidio, Paulo, Agostinho, Amadeu, Manoel, Aderito, Lourenco, Marcio, Serafim.

Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name   Fernando  . This is one of the most common surnames in Portugal. It is also found in Goa and elsewhere on the west coast of India, having been taken there by Portuguese colonists.
Spanish: variant or altered form of Fernández (see Fernandez ).

variants.name: Fernando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luis, Orlando, Aida, Carlos, Jesusa, Rodolfo, Ruben, Adela, Alfredo, Alicia.  Indian Rohan, Lalith, Nimal, Rajiv, Sanjeeva, Shanthi, Anil, Anusha, Dushan, Kapila, Lakshman, Mallika.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Fernando, a younger form of Ferdinando (see Ferdinand ). This surname is also found in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there, and as a result of the expulsion of the Jews from Spain and Portugal at the end of the 15th century, many of whom moved to Italy. It is also common in western India and especially in Sri Lanka, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Cunha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luiz, Fernando, Ricardo, Domingos, Eduardo, Jorge, Alberto, Americo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Albano, Conceicao, Henrique, Margarida, Vasco, Zulmira.
Portuguese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cunha; the ancient form of the placename is Cuinha, probably meaning ‘kitchen’ (from Latin culina). Compare Da Cunha .

variants.name: Cuna
meanings: Italian (mainly Apulia): perhaps a nickname from cuna ‘crib’.
Portuguese: nickname related to cuna ‘crib’, or perhaps a variant of Cunha .

variants.name: Da Cunha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Afonso, Albano, Almir, Ilidio, Serafim.  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Mario, Carlos, Alvaro, Fernando, Jorge, Rogerio, Alfonso, Alfredo, Armando, Armindo.
Portuguese: variant of Cunha , with the addition of da, a shortened form of the preposition de ‘from’ and the feminine definite article a ‘the’.

nameMeanings.name: Lourenço
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Fernando, Abilio, Mario, Albino, Armando, Luis, Luiz, Adalberto.  Portuguese Joaquim, Joao, Adauto, Anabela, Duarte, Goncalo, Leao, Paulo, Valentim.
Portuguese (Lourenço): from the personal name Lourenço, Latin Laurentius (see Lawrence ).

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha was born in 1145, in Braga, Portugal, his father, Fernão Paes da Cunha, was 42 and his mother, D. Mayor Rendufe, was 35. He married Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira on 24 October 1198. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1225, in Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha est né en 1145, à Braga, Portugal, son père, Fernão Paes da Cunha, avait 42 ans et sa mère, D. Mayor Rendufe, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira le 24 octobre 1198. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1225, à Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha 1145 in Braga, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fernão Paes da Cunha 42 und seine Mutter D. Mayor Rendufe 35. Er hat am 24. Oktober 1198 Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1225 in Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha è nato il nel 1145 nel Braga, Portogallo, il suo padre, Fernão Paes da Cunha, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, D. Mayor Rendufe, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira il 24 ottobre 1198. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1225, nel Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Lourenço Fernandes da Cunhaが1145年にポルトガルブラガで生まれた時，父Fernão Paes da Cunhaは42歳，母D. Mayor Rendufeは35歳であった。1198年10月24日にMaria Sancha Lourenço de Maceiraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1225年以後にポルトガルブラガブラガクウンハで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha(이)가 1145년 포르투갈 브라가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fernão Paes da Cunha(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 D. Mayor Rendufe(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1198년 10월 24일 Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1225년 이후 포르투갈 브라가 브라가 쿤하에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha nasceu em 1145, em Braga, Portugal, seu pai, Fernão Paes da Cunha, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, D. Mayor Rendufe, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira em 24 de outubro de 1198. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1225, em Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha родился в 1145 г. в местности брага, Португалия, его отцу по имени Fernão Paes da Cunha было 42 года, а матери, которую звали D. Mayor Rendufe, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira 24 октября 1198 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1225 г. в местности куна, брага, брага, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lourenço Fernandes da Cunha nació en 1145, en Braga, Portugal, su papá, Fernão Paes da Cunha, tenía 42 años y su mamá, D. Mayor Rendufe, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maria Sancha Lourenço de Maceira el 24 de octubre de 1198. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1225, en Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal.
